title: pendusalpinx patula
side_effects: Pendusalpinx patula can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, skin irritation, and allergic reactions. Consuming large quantities of the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Additionally, topical application of the plant extracts can cause skin rashes, redness, and itching in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can also trigger respiratory problems, such as coughing and shortness of breath.
